data.title: EON Resources Adds Independent Director to Support Growth
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from EON Resources ( (EONR) ) is now available.

On January 26, 2026, EON Resources Inc. appointed petroleum engineer Kyle Bulpitt as an independent Class II director to fill the board vacancy created by the retirement of long-serving director and early company backer Byron Blount on December 31, 2025. Bulpitt, 33, who currently serves as Executive Vice President for Corporate Development at Aethel Energy and has a background spanning acquisitions and divestitures, debt and equity financing, asset-backed securitizations and petroleum reserves analysis, will chair EON’s Audit Committee and sit on its Compensation and Nominating and Corporate Governance Committees, receiving standard non-employee director compensation plus an additional retainer for his audit role; company executives emphasized that his dealmaking and financing expertise aligns with EON’s next stage of financing and acquisition-driven growth in its Permian Basin portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (EONR) stock is a Hold with a $0.44 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on EON Resources stock, see the EONR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EONR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EONR is a Neutral.

The score is held down mainly by weak financial performance (declining revenue and negative operating cash flow) and a bearish technical setup (below major moving averages with negative MACD). These are partially offset by a strong, debt-reduction-focused earnings update with funded growth plans, while valuation is difficult to assess due to the negative P/E and lack of dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on EONR stock, click here.

More about EON Resources

EON Resources Inc. is an independent upstream energy company focused on developing onshore oil and natural gas properties across a diversified portfolio of long-life producing assets and other energy holdings. The company holds 20,000 leasehold acres in the Permian Basin with 750 producing and injection wells generating over 1,000 barrels of oil per day, and its core properties include the Grayburg-Jackson Field in Eddy County and the South Justis Field in Lea County, New Mexico, where it pursues both waterflood recovery and horizontal drilling programs to maximize shareholder returns.

Average Trading Volume: 1,402,432

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $20.78M

Find detailed analytics on EONR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: JetBlue outlines 2026 outlook amid JetForward progress
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

JetBlue Airways ( (JBLU) ) has shared an update.

On January 27, 2026, JetBlue Airways reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results that showed modest declines in capacity and revenue but continued progress under its JetForward transformation program, which delivered $305 million of incremental EBIT in 2025, above target. While macroeconomic pressures kept the carrier from returning to profitability, JetBlue cited a second consecutive year of improved operational reliability, higher customer satisfaction scores, strong demand and ancillary revenue, as well as strategic initiatives including the Blue Sky collaboration with United Airlines, lounge expansion, domestic first-class rollout, fleet simplification and capital expenditure cuts of about $3 billion for 2026–2029. For 2026, management guided to a return to measured growth, low unit cost increases, and breakeven or better adjusted operating margins, supported by additional JetForward EBIT, a constructive demand and capacity backdrop, and ample liquidity of $2.5 billion at year-end 2025, positioning the airline for significant margin improvement despite ongoing engine-related aircraft groundings.

The most recent analyst rating on (JBLU) stock is a Sell with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on JetBlue Airways stock, see the JBLU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on JBLU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, JBLU is a Neutral.

JetBlue’s overall stock score is primarily impacted by significant financial challenges, including high leverage and negative cash flows. However, positive technical indicators and optimistic earnings call guidance provide some support. The valuation remains unattractive due to ongoing losses.

To see Spark’s full report on JBLU stock, click here.

More about JetBlue Airways

JetBlue Airways is a U.S. low-fare carrier branded as New York’s Hometown Airline and a leading airline in Boston, Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood, Los Angeles, Orlando and San Juan, serving more than 110 destinations across the United States, Latin America, the Caribbean, Canada and Europe with a focus on customer service, leisure travel and product differentiation such as onboard Wi‑Fi and premium offerings.

Average Trading Volume: 18,679,813

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $1.85B

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Dogness (International) ( (DOGZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 14, 2026, Dogness (International) Corporation’s audit committee and board approved the appointment of Assentsure PAC as the company’s new independent registered public accounting firm and, on the same date, dismissed its previous auditor, Audit Alliance LLP, which had served in that role for the fiscal years ended June 30, 2022 through 2025. The company reported that there were no disagreements or reportable events with Audit Alliance over accounting principles, financial disclosures, or audit scope during that period, and Audit Alliance’s reports carried no adverse or modified opinions, a point the outgoing auditor confirmed in a January 26, 2026 letter to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission—suggesting that the auditor transition reflects a strategic change rather than a response to accounting disputes, and signaling operational continuity and limited immediate concern for investors regarding the integrity of Dogness’s historical financial reporting.

data.title: Itaú Unibanco Raises Gross Interest on Capital to Offset Higher IoC Tax in 2026
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Itau Unibanco ( (ITUB) ) has shared an update.

On January 26, 2026, Itaú Unibanco announced an adjustment to the gross amount of its monthly Interest on Capital (IoC) distributions for fiscal year 2026, following the enactment of Supplementary Law No. 224/2025, effective January 1, 2026, which raised the withholding income tax rate on IoC from 15% to 17.5%. To keep shareholders’ net proceeds unchanged at BRL 0.015 per common and preferred share, the bank recalibrated the gross IoC amount to BRL 0.018182 per share, except for corporate shareholders that are legally exempt or tax-immune, and confirmed that the previously disclosed monthly payment schedule from January to December 2026, with payments running from February 2, 2026 through January 4, 2027, remains unchanged, providing continued visibility and predictability for investors regarding cash returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (ITUB) stock is a Hold with a $9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Itau Unibanco stock, see the ITUB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ITUB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ITUB is a Neutral.

Itau Unibanco’s overall stock score is driven by strong financial performance in terms of revenue growth and profitability, despite challenges with leverage and cash flow. The technical analysis supports a positive trend, and the valuation is attractive with a reasonable P/E ratio and high dividend yield. The absence of earnings call and corporate events data limits further insights.

To see Spark’s full report on ITUB stock, click here.

More about Itau Unibanco

Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. is a leading Brazilian financial institution operating primarily in commercial and retail banking, offering a broad range of financial services including lending, deposits, and investment products to individual and corporate clients. The bank is listed in Brazil and in the United States as a foreign issuer and maintains an active shareholder base that receives regular distributions in the form of interest on capital (IoC).

Average Trading Volume: 20,458,751

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $88.82B

For a thorough assessment of ITUB stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Top Streamex Insiders Make Bold Moves With Fresh Share Purchases
data.description:
New insider activity at Streamex ( (STEX) ) has taken place on January 26, 2026.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Recent insider activity at Streamex highlights growing confidence from top leadership. Director Morgan Lee Lekstrom acquired 41,000 shares of Streamex stock in a transaction valued at $128,330. In a separate move, Chief Investment Officer Williams Mitchell Young purchased 51,511 shares, with his buy totaling $155,563. These combined insider purchases underscore a notable show of support and conviction in Streamex’s future from key decision-makers inside the company.

Recent Updates on STEX stock

Over the last 24 hours, Streamex has announced several capital-structure and strategic moves that are likely driving analyst reassessments of its prospects. The company delivered an optional prepayment notice to fully retire $50M of secured convertible debentures (including a contractual premium), which reduces future conversion overhang but also consumes cash, sharpening focus on its ongoing losses and cash-burn profile. At the same time, Streamex terminated its $1B standby equity purchase agreement with Yorkville, signaling it will not rely on that facility for future funding and instead is turning to traditional equity markets: it launched an underwritten common-stock offering, with a 11.67M-share secondary deal priced below the prior close, increasing concerns about dilution and pressuring the stock price. Strategically, Streamex is partnering with tZERO to enable secondary trading of its GLDY gold-linked tokenized security, which supports the long-term liquidity and commercial potential of that product line. These moves collectively frame the recent analyst stance and target updates by balancing persistent weak financial performance and dilution risk against improved balance-sheet clarity, added liquidity from equity issuance, and growth optionality from GLDY and related initiatives.

Spark’s Take on STEX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, STEX is a Neutral.

The score is constrained primarily by weak financial performance (persistent losses, ongoing cash burn, and negative equity) and bearish technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). Corporate events provide some offset via added liquidity and strategic actions, but valuation remains challenged due to loss-making fundamentals.

data.title: Top Regions Financial Executive Unloads a Major Stake in High-Value Stock Sale
data.description:
New insider activity at Regions Financial ( (RF) ) has taken place on January 26, 2026.

Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Senior Executive Vice President William Ritter has executed a significant sale of Regions Financial stock, unloading 36,000 shares in a single transaction. The move, valued at $1,035,720, represents a notable monetization of equity by a top executive and may draw attention from investors tracking insider trading activity at Regions Financial.

Recent Updates on RF stock

Over the last day, Regions Financial has seen notable analyst reassessments driven more by changing views on its risk/reward profile than by immediate price target moves. Keefe Bruyette downgraded the stock after concluding that the market is rotating toward banks with stronger visible growth, while Regions faces a growing need to defend market share and step up technology investment, making its near‑term risk/reward look more balanced despite solid profitability and modernization progress. Separately, Wells Fargo downgraded the shares following what it viewed as weaker‑than‑expected guidance, particularly on fees and net interest income, arguing that this confirms a tougher setup for more traditional regional banks in a competitive landscape increasingly dominated by larger players. These calls came against the backdrop of Regions’ Q4 report and earnings call, which highlighted strong full‑year returns, rising net interest margin, robust capital and liquidity, and ongoing tech and growth investments, but also acknowledged loan growth headwinds, elevated but normalizing credit costs, and higher near‑term technology spending that could pressure earnings in the short run.

Spark’s Take on RF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RF is a Outperform.

RF scores well primarily on solid underlying financial performance (profitability, growth, and low leverage) and a constructive earnings outlook with clear 2026 guidance and ongoing capital returns. Madrigal Pharmaceuticals has recently seen multiple insider stock sales by its top executives. President & CEO William John Sibold sold 1,577 shares of company stock for a total value of $776,546. These transactions highlight notable insider activity among the company’s senior leadership team.

Recent Updates on MDGL stock

In the last 24 hours, Madrigal Pharmaceuticals’ stock action has been driven mainly by a downgrade from Wolfe Research, which shifted its rating to a more neutral stance after the shares’ strong outperformance in November and December. The analyst argued that, even assuming robust peak sales expectations in the $4–6B range that many investors are modeling, the current share price already reflects a very full valuation, leaving less upside relative to perceived risk. Additionally, the firm pointed to concerns around weak patent strength at a competitor, Inventiva, which could affect the competitive and intellectual property landscape in Madrigal’s therapeutic area. Prior upward revisions to expectations earlier in the cycle from other firms had been tied to strong commercial potential and increasing confidence in the company’s lead asset, but the latest move reflects a view that these positives are now largely priced into the stock.

Spark’s Take on MDGL Stock
